hero.title: Protect India's Digital Future Together
hero.subtitle: Scan suspicious links, detect scam messages, report cyber threats, and earn points as a citizen cyber defender. Every scan makes India safer.

features.title: Platform Features
features.subtitle: Everything You Need to Stay Safe
features.desc: A complete cybersecurity toolkit for every Indian citizen

cta.title: Join 89,000+ Cyber Defenders
cta.desc: Every report you submit, every threat you detect helps protect millions of Indians from cybercrime.

scanner.title: Enhanced URL Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan Suspicious Links
scanner.description: 3-Engine analysis: Rules + AI + Google Safe Browsing/PhishTank DBs for maximum accuracy.
scanner.label: Enter URL to Scan

progress.backend: Backend server must be running on port 5000

password.title: Password Checker
password.subtitle: Check Password Strength
password.desc: Evaluate your password's security with entropy analysis and get actionable suggestions.
password.label: Enter Your Password

tips.text: Never use your Aadhaar number, date of birth, or phone number as a password
Use a unique password for your UPI apps — different from email
Change your internet banking password every 3-6 months
Use a password manager to store complex passwords

heatmap.title: LIVE CYBER THREAT HEATMAP
heatmap.subtitle: Animated real-time cyber attacks across India

education.title: Cyber Awareness Hub
education.subtitle: Master digital safety through interactive visual guides

phishing.title: Spotting Phishing
phishing.desc: Phishing is a way scammers try to trick you into giving them your passwords or personal info. Always check the sender's email carefully!

passwords.title: Strong Passwords
passwords.desc: A strong password is like a strong lock. Use at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols. Don't use your birthday!

otp.title: Protect Your OTP
otp.desc: OTP (One-Time Password) is for your eyes only. Never share it with anyone over the phone, even if they say they are from your bank.

future.title: Interactive Tutorials Coming Soon
future.desc: We are building more visual lessons and interactive simulations to help you master cyber security in your preferred language.

challenges.title: Cyber Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Test your skills with AI-generated questions

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Cyber Champions of India
leaderboard.desc: Compete with fellow cyber defenders. Earn points, join clans, and climb the ranks.
leaderboard.statsDesc: Start completing challenges to appear on the leaderboard!

admin.title: Admin Control Panel
admin.description: Manage platform security, monitor threats, and oversee community activities.

report.title: Report Threat
report.subtitle: Report a Cyber Threat
report.desc: Help protect other Indians by reporting scams, phishing links, and fraud attempts.

form.title: Threat Information
form.consent: I consent to share this information for cybersecurity awareness.

success.title: Thank You, Cyber Defender!
success.desc: Your report has been recorded. You've earned +50 points!
